description: Add Config REST API endpoints to dashboard/app.py and build a fully functional Settings page with model management UI
steps: In dashboard/app.py, add the following API endpoints using src/augur/config.py (get_config, set_config, save_config): GET /api/config (return full config), PUT /api/config (update full config, accept JSON body), GET /api/config/persona/{agent_id} (get model config for one persona), PUT /api/config/persona/{agent_id} (update model for one persona, accept JSON body with 'model' field), GET /api/models (return available_models from config), POST /api/custom-persona (accept YAML content, save to personas/custom/), GET /api/schema/persona (return persona YAML schema definition)
Update dashboard/app.py settings_page route to pass personas list and available_models data to the template context

Rewrite dashboard/templates/settings.html to be a fully functional settings page: display all 17 personas in a table/grid with avatar (from /docs/images/avatars/{id}.svg), name, style tags, and a model dropdown for each. Populate dropdowns from available_models (flattened list from all providers). Add Save button per persona that calls PUT /api/config/persona/{id}. Add toast notification system for success/error feedback. Include a 'Save All' button. Keep Bloomberg dark theme styling consistent with other pages.
Add toast notification CSS to dashboard/static/css/baoyu.css or inline in settings.html - dark-themed toast that slides in from top-right
Add test in tests/test_registry.py or a new tests/test_api.py to verify the new config API endpoints work (import app from dashboard.app, use TestClient)
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/config returns JSON with defaults and per_agent keys from agents.yaml
PUT /api/config/persona/buffett with {"model": "gpt-4o"} updates config and returns success
GET /api/models returns flattened list of all available models
Settings page displays all 17 personas with current model and working dropdowns
Saving a model change shows toast notification and persists the change
verification: python -c "from dashboard.app import app; print('Dashboard imports OK')"
python -c "from augur.config import get_config; c = get_config(); print('Config OK:', 'per_agent' in c)"
findings: All 48 tests pass. jinja2 and httpx needed to be installed (not in pyproject.toml dependencies but available). TestClient works without async. Pydantic BaseModel imported from pydantic (already available via fastapi dependency).
